action.name: approved
closed
rejected
reindex

notification.name: Review Notification Email
notification.template:
<#assign companyLocalServiceUtil = serviceLocator.findService("com.liferay.portal.kernel.service.CompanyLocalService") /> <#assign company = companyLocalServiceUtil.getCompany(getterUtil.getLong(companyId)) /> <#assign workflowTaskURL = portalUtil.getPortalURL(company.getVirtualHostname(), portalUtil.getPortalPort(true), true) + "/group/control_panel/manage/-/my_workflow_tasks/view/" + kaleoTaskInstanceToken.getKaleoTaskInstanceTokenId()?c + "?_com_liferay_portal_workflow_task_web_portlet_MyWorkflowTaskPortlet_mvcPath=%2Fedit_workflow_task.jsp" /> <#assign salesforceOpportunityURL = "https://login.salesforce.com/" + osbSalesforceOpportunityKey /> Hi Reviewer,

A ${languageUtil.get(localeUtil.getDefault(), osbSalesforceOpportunityTaskName)} task has been created in OSB for you to review:
${workflowTaskURL}

It is based on the following Salesforce opportunity:
${salesforceOpportunityURL}

Sincerely,
Liferay Support
